member.name: T:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.AdminDevicesController
member.summary: Exposes administrative operations for inspecting and calibrating FartTag devices.

member.name: M:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.AdminDevicesController.#ctor(FartSocial.Application.Devices.IDeviceService)
member.summary: Exposes administrative operations for inspecting and calibrating FartTag devices.

member.name: M:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.AdminDevicesController.GetAll(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets every registered device.

member.name: M:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.AdminDevicesController.GetById(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a registered device by its identifier.

member.summary: Creates and stores a new calibration for a device.

member.name: M:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.AdminDevicesController.GetLogs(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the diagnostic logs recorded for a device.

member.name: T:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.AdminWalletController
member.summary: Exposes administrative access to user wallets and their transactions.

member.name: M:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.AdminWalletController.#ctor(FartSocial.Application.Economy.IEconomyService)
member.summary: Exposes administrative access to user wallets and their transactions.

member.name: M:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.AdminWalletController.GetWallet(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a user's Flatulons wallet.

member.name: M:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.AdminWalletController.GetTransactions(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the append-only transaction history for a user's wallet.

member.name: T:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: Handles user registration, authentication, token renewal, and logout.

member.summary: Handles user registration, authentication, token renewal, and logout.

member.name: M:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.AuthController.Register(FartSocial.Application.Auth.Dtos.RegisterRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Registers a new user and returns authentication tokens.

member.name: M:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.AuthController.Login(FartSocial.Application.Auth.Dtos.LoginRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Authenticates a user and returns authentication tokens.

member.name: M:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.AuthController.Refresh(FartSocial.Application.Auth.Dtos.RefreshTokenRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Renews authentication tokens using a valid refresh token.

member.name: M:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.AuthController.Logout(FartSocial.Application.Auth.Dtos.LogoutRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Revokes the supplied refresh token.

member.summary: Provides the badge catalog and badges earned by the authenticated user.

member.summary: Provides the badge catalog and badges earned by the authenticated user.

member.summary: Gets the active badge catalog.

member.name: M:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.BadgesController.GetMine(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets badges earned by the authenticated user.

member.name: T:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.DevicesController
member.summary: Manages FartTag devices owned by the authenticated user.

member.summary: Manages FartTag devices owned by the authenticated user.

member.summary: Gets devices owned by the authenticated user.

member.name: M:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.DevicesController.GetById(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets an owned device by its identifier.

member.name: T:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.FartEventsController
member.summary: Creates and manages detected fart events for the authenticated user.
member.param: The persistence context used for audio files.

member.name: M:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.FartEventsController.#ctor(FartSocial.Application.FartEvents.IFartEventService,FartSocial.Application.FartEvents.IFartEventReadService,FartSocial.Infrastructure.Persistence.FartSocialDbContext)
member.summary: Creates and manages detected fart events for the authenticated user.
member.param: The persistence context used for audio files.

member.name: M:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.FartEventsController.Create(FartSocial.Application.FartEvents.Dtos.CreateFartEventRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a fart event and returns the backend-calculated official result.

member.name: M:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.FartEventsController.UploadAudio(FartSocial.Application.FartEvents.Requests.UploadAudioRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Uploads a phone microphone recording before creating its fart event.

member.name: M:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.FartEventsController.GetAudio(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Streams an uploaded recording to its owner or viewers of a public event.

member.name: M:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.FartEventsController.GetMyHistory(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the authenticated user's fart event history.

member.name: M:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.FartEventsController.GetById(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets an accessible fart event by its identifier.

member.name: M:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.FartEventsController.GetComments(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets comments for an accessible fart event.

member.name: M:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.FartEventsController.UpdateVisibility(System.Guid,FartSocial.Application.FartEvents.Dtos.UpdateFartVisibilityRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates the public visibility of an owned fart event.

member.name: M:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.FartEventsController.React(System.Guid,FartSocial.Application.FartEvents.Dtos.ReactToFartRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds or replaces the authenticated user's reaction to a fart event.

member.name: M:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.FartEventsController.Comment(System.Guid,FartSocial.Application.Social.Dtos.CreateCommentRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds a comment to an accessible fart event.

member.summary: Provides the public social feed for the authenticated user.

member.summary: Provides the public social feed for the authenticated user.

member.name: M:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.FeedController.GetFeed(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets recent public fart events with reactions and comments.

member.summary: Manages friendships and friend requests for the authenticated user.

member.summary: Manages friendships and friend requests for the authenticated user.

member.summary: Gets the authenticated user's friends.

member.summary: Gets incoming and outgoing pending friend requests.

member.summary: Sends a friend request to another user.

member.summary: Accepts an incoming friend request.

member.name: M:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.FriendsController.RejectFriendRequest(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Rejects an incoming friend request.

member.name: M:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.FriendsController.DeleteFriend(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Removes an existing friendship.

member.summary: Provides and manages cosmetic inventory owned by the authenticated user.

member.summary: Provides and manages cosmetic inventory owned by the authenticated user.

member.name: T:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.LeaderboardsController
member.summary: Provides backend-calculated global and friend leaderboards.

member.summary: Provides backend-calculated global and friend leaderboards.

member.summary: Gets global score, weekly, longest, and toxic leaderboards.

member.name: M:FartSocial.Api.Controllers.LeaderboardsController.GetFriends(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets leaderboards scoped to the authenticated user and their friends.

member.summary: Provides loot boxes and performs server-authoritative reward draws.

member.summary: Provides loot boxes and performs server-authoritative reward draws.

member.summary: Opens a loot box and returns the server-selected reward.

member.summary: Converts unhandled application exceptions into consistent HTTP error responses.

member.summary: Converts unhandled application exceptions into consistent HTTP error responses.

member.summary: Executes the next middleware and handles any exception it throws.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.
